reviews.comment:
Todo cómodo lo malo le falta mantenimiento a las puertas del baño..una chica quedo encerrada y salio por debajo d la puerta..la comida bastante variada para ser una estación de servicio

(Translated by Google)
Everything was comfortable, the only downside was the lack of maintenance on the bathroom doors...a girl got locked in and had to crawl out under the door...the food was quite varied for a gas station
